news.t: Defiance Launches RKLX and HIMZ: 2X Leveraged ETFs for Rocket Lab and Hims & Hers

holdings.infoBox: RKLX is an equity ETF with a total of 13 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Defiance Daily Target 2X Long RKLB ETF (RKLX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. The fund aims to provide 2x long daily price performance of Rocket Lab USA, Inc. shares, less fees and expenses, through the use of swap contracts RKLX was launched on Mar 12, 2025 and is issued by Defiance.

data.title: Defiance Launches RKLX and HIMZ: 2X Leveraged ETFs for Rocket Lab and Hims & Hers
data.text: MIAMI, March 13, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Defiance ETFs introduces RKLX and HIMZ, two 2X leveraged single-stock ETFs designed to provide amplified exposure to Rocket Lab USA, Inc. (NASDAQ: RKLB) and H...
